title: Regarding Midterm Exams for Rectorate Common Courses
content:
Regarding Midterm Exams for Rectorate Common Courses

The midterm exams for rectorate common courses in the 2024-2025 fall semester will take place on Wednesday and Thursday, November 27-28, 2024, between 5:30 p.m. and 7:20 p.m.

In accordance with regulations, the midterm exams will be conducted in classrooms under supervision, similar to other courses. You can learn which campus and classroom you are assigned to, along with exam rules, from the announcements to be posted on STIX one week before the exam. Students must take the exam in their designated classrooms. Therefore, it is essential to verify your location before the exam.

Good luck!

ANNOUNCEMENT FOR MIDTERM EXAMS FOR RECTORATE COMPULSORY COMMON COURSES - FALL SEMESTER 2024-2025

Dates

- Thursday, November 28, 2024, Associate Degree Program Students

Courses and Exam Schedule

- Atatürk’s Principles and History of Reforms III (ATA103)*

- Turkish Language III (TÜRK DİLİ 103)*

- English III (ING103 / INGU103)*
